name: Avocado Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the avocados and dice the pulp.
2. Puree the pulp in a blender container with chicken broth.
3. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
4. Gradually stir in whipping cream.
5. Chill.
6. Add cognac and sherry just before serving.
Note: To make frozen avocado-shell cups for soup, cut a slice from the stem end of the avocado. Scoop out the pulp and discard the seed. Reserve the cap. Use the pulp for soup or puree with a small amount of lemon juice and freeze for future use. Place the shell upright in a cup or egg carton. Freeze until firm. To serve, embed the avocado shell in crushed ice in a dessert dish or soup bowl. Carefully spoon in the soup and lean the cap against the side of the avocado. Makes about 4 cups.
